name: InlineQueryResultVideo
description: Represents a link to a page containing an embedded video player or a video file. By default, this video file will be sent by the user with an optional caption. Alternatively, you can use input_message_content to send a message with the specified content instead of the video.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the result, must be video

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this result, 1-64 bytes

fields.name: video_url
fields.description: A valid URL for the embedded video player or video file

fields.name: mime_type
fields.description: MIME type of the content of the video URL, “text/html” or “video/mp4”

fields.name: thumbnail_url
fields.description: URL of the thumbnail (JPEG only) for the video

fields.name: caption
fields.description: Caption of the video to be sent, 0-1024 characters after entities parsing

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the video caption. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: caption_entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in the caption, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

fields.name: show_caption_above_media
fields.description: Pass True, if the caption must be shown above the message media

fields.name: reply_markup
fields.description: Inline keyboard attached to the message

fields.name: input_message_content
fields.description: Content of the message to be sent instead of the video. This field is required if InlineQueryResultVideo is used to send an HTML-page as a result (e.g., a YouTube video).
